title: dendranthema × grandiflorum
intro: Dendranthema × grandiflorum, also known as Chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and stress, and improving eye health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Chrysanthemum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
